title: r@mah #7412
definition:
1) to cast, throw
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to cast
        1a2) to throw
             1a2a) of tribute (fig)
    1b) (Peil)
        1b1) to be cast
        1b2) to be placed, be set
    1c) (Ithp'el) to be cast
